did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study did not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results. It utilized open-source image analysis software (CellProfiler) for morphometric feature extraction and standard statistical methods (Wilcoxon’s rank-sum test, logistic regression, PCA, t-SNE, LDA) for data analysis. While the paper discusses the implications of morphometric differences for AI diagnostic models, it does not train, test, or employ any AI/ML algorithms itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
